title: Bondage and Liberation
summary: Definition of bondage (desiring objects) vs liberation (letting go of desire). Addresses addictions, attachment, and unhealthy habits.

sections.summary: Themes: mind and meditation, freedom from attachment. The passage moves from “Ashtavakra said: Bondage is when the mind longs for something, grieves about something, rejects something, holds on to something, is pleased…” through “Bondage is when the mind is tangled in one of the senses, and liberation is when the mind is not tangled in any of the senses.” through “When there is no “me,” that is liberation, and when there is “me” there is bondage. Consider this carefully, and neither hold on to anything nor…”

verses.sanskrit: अष्टावक्र उवाच तदा बन्धो यदा चित्तं किन्चिद् वांछति शोचति। किंचिन् मुंचति गृण्हाति किंचिद् हृष्यति कुप्यति॥
verses.translation: Ashtavakra said: Bondage is when the mind longs for something, grieves about something, rejects something, holds on to something, is pleased about something or displeased about something.
verses.hindi: तब बंधन है जब मन इच्छा करता है, शोक करता है, कुछ त्याग करता है, कुछ ग्रहण करता है, कभी प्रसन्न होता है या कभी क्रोधित होता है॥

verses.sanskrit: तदा मुक्तिर्यदा चित्तं न वांछति न शोचति। न मुंचति न गृण्हाति न हृष्यति न कुप्यति॥
verses.translation: Liberation is when the mind does not long for anything, grieve about anything, reject anything, or hold on to anything, and is not pleased about anything or displeased about anything.
verses.hindi: तब मुक्ति है जब मन इच्छा नहीं करता है, शोक नहीं करता है, त्याग नहीं करता है, ग्रहण नहीं करता है, प्रसन्न नहीं होता है या क्रोधित नहीं होता है॥

verses.sanskrit: तदा बन्धो यदा चित्तं सक्तं काश्वपि दृष्टिषु। तदा मोक्षो यदा चित्तम- सक्तं सर्वदृष्टिषु॥
verses.translation: Bondage is when the mind is tangled in one of the senses, and liberation is when the mind is not tangled in any of the senses.
verses.hindi: तब बंधन है जब मन किसी भी दृश्यमान वस्तु में आसक्त है, तब मुक्ति है जब मन किसी भी दृश्यमान वस्तु में आसक्तिरहित है ॥

verses.sanskrit: यदा नाहं तदा मोक्षो यदाहं बन्धनं तदा। मत्वेति हेलया किंचिन्- मा गृहाण विमुंच मा॥
verses.translation: When there is no “me,” that is liberation, and when there is “me” there is bondage. Consider this carefully, and neither hold on to anything nor reject anything.
verses.hindi: जब तक 'मैं' या 'मेरा' का भाव है तब तक बंधन है, जब 'मैं' या 'मेरा' का भाव नहीं है तब मुक्ति है। यह जानकर न कुछ त्याग करो और न कुछ ग्रहण ही करो ॥
